release_notes: Animation tuning pass based on side-by-side picker review. Fixes: (1) Surprise — the '!' mark is now positioned above the raised hands instead of overlapping them; (2) Newspaper — replaced two-spot variant with a single-spot version where a chair fades in, the figure sits down, reads, then stands back up; (3) Stretches — middle pose changed from overhead reach to a side-lunge with diagonal arms so it doesn't pile up on itself visually; (4) Horse — scrapped entirely (didn't read as a horse) and replaced with a Juggling animation: figure stands in one spot and juggles three balls in a clear cascade pattern; (5) Jumping jacks — arm angles were both going up-and-crossing-over-the-head, now correctly swing OUT to each side (one up-left, one up-right); (6) Power nap — body rotation from vertical to horizontal now uses shortest-arc interpolation so the figure doesn't briefly flip through upside-down; (7) Weights — second location now does bicep curls instead of more overhead presses (different lift type per spot); (8) Cartwheel — limbs now have a small splay offset from the body axis so the figure doesn't collapse into a single line during rotations; (9) Yoga — middle pose changed from Warrior II to a Side Stretch with the body curved hard to one side and one arm overhead (much more readable in 2D); (10) Peek-out / peek-back — the figure now starts horizontal with body and limbs all aligned along the body axis, so the entire figure (including feet) fits inside the button-shaped mask. As emergence progresses, the body rotates from horizontal to vertical via shortest arc while the hip slides outward — feet stay hidden until the figure has cleared the button edge. New _lerp_angle helper does shortest-arc angle interpolation, used by both the new peek transitions and the Power-nap rotation fix.
